overview: Cenegenics provides precision health optimization through comprehensive biomarker testing and personalized longevity programming. Their approach includes in-home diagnostics, measurement of 100+ biomarkers, and physician-led assessment with ongoing biofeedback-guided adjustments.
highlights: Measures over 100 biomarkers to establish health baseline
Dedicated Performance Health Team including physician, coach, coordinator, and phlebotomist
targetAudience: Individuals seeking to optimize healthspan and longevity through data-driven preventive health strategies and biomarker optimization.
